name: The Shattered Glade
description: A divergence where the corruption of Shadow Groves spreads faster than expected, and an entire region of Elarion falls before the Auryn can react.

divergence_event.timeline_ref: Year 985 of the Age of Light
divergence_event.description: The Eclipse aftermath: instead of one fall, three regions collapse simultaneously

visual.style_adjustment: darker tones, fractured light, eternal dusk, broken crystals
